name: mssql-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for Microsoft SQL Server — schema discovery, reads, previews, and gated writes. Experimental; not for production.
long_description: Connect Claude Desktop to Microsoft SQL Server or Azure SQL using MCP. Supports natural-language driven queries, schema inspection, row-level CRUD with preview tokens, optional DDL tools, and read-only mode. Configure your server host, database, and credentials securely when installing.

database_name.title: Default database
database_name.description: Default database name. Can be left empty if ‘Additional databases’ lists all allowed databases.

databases.title: Additional databases
databases.description: Optional comma-separated allowlist (e.g. ProdDB,StagingDB). Leave empty for single-database mode.

db_user.title: SQL login
db_user.description: SQL Server user (SQL authentication). Leave empty for Windows integrated authentication setups.

db_password.title: SQL password
db_password.description: SQL Server password (SQL authentication). Leave empty if not used.

readonly.title: Read-only mode
readonly.description: When enabled, only inspection and read tools are available.

max_rows.title: Max rows (reads)
max_rows.description: Maximum rows returned by read tools.

trust_server_certificate.title: Trust server certificate
trust_server_certificate.description: Enable for self-signed certificates (typical in local dev).

mcp_transport.title: MCP transport
mcp_transport.description: stdio (default) or http for Streamable HTTP.

mcp_base_url.title: Public base URL
mcp_base_url.description: Optional external base URL for HTTP deployments.

enable_ddl.title: Enable DDL tools
enable_ddl.description: Allows create/drop table and create index tools when enabled.

max_write_rows.title: Max rows per write
max_write_rows.description: Cap on rows a single write tool may affect.

require_write_preview.title: Require write preview
require_write_preview.description: When enabled, use preview_update / preview_delete before update_data / delete_data.
